name: autonomy-status
question: What is the resolved autonomy level for this session, and what is its source?

schema.level: one of: autopilot, supervised, collaborative, controlled, manual
schema.source: one of: session-override, ltads-session, task-arc-autonomy, config, default
schema.source_detail: human-readable description of source location and resolution path
schema.briefing: string for [autonomy] briefing line; empty when level==collaborative

consultation.rationale: Cascade resolution otherwise duplicated across session-start.{sh,ps1}, /0-uldf-autonomy-set status display, and ad-hoc consumers. One oracle call per session-start; zero per follow-up consumer.

fallback: Treat resolved level as 'collaborative'. The cascade's documented default is collaborative; agents falling through to default carry no risk beyond the existing default behavior.

provenance.decision_ref: DEC-39 (cascade is canonical consent gate), DEC-40 (task-arc-autonomy.json schema)
